positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a forest spirit creature curled around a crescent moon and bioluminescent mushrooms. The creature has soft, flowing textures and glowing elements. Style: Line art illustration mixed with watercolor wash and deep indigo/emerald color palette. Composition: Central, symmetrical focus, designed for apparel print. Details: High contrast silhouettes, glowing edges, deep depth of field, clean outlines, vibrant contrast between the luminous elements and the dark forest background. Print-friendly, vector-style quality.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, logo, watermark, artifacts, noise, low detail, poor composition, grayscale, cartoonish, photographic, signature, out of frame
